title: Family Summer Special
address: 900 N Birch Rd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
shortWhy: Bonnet House Museum & Gardens in Fort Lauderdale Beach.
editorialWhy: Family Summer Special at Bonnet House June 2 – August 30 Bonnet House Museum & Gardens is proud to host our Family Summer Special , presented by Joe DiMaggio Children’s Hospital! Enjoy a day of discovery with $30 admission for adults , and free admission for children and teens ages 17 and under . Explore the beauty and history of Bonnet House at your own pace with a self-guided tour of the main house, stroll through our lush gardens, and experience the unique aquatic wildlife in our tranquil lakes and ponds. Bonnet House is the perfect destination for a family outing this summer. With complimentary admission for youth, it’s an affordable way to spend quality time together while learning about the rich history and natural environment of South Florida. We look forward to welcoming you and your family! Hours: Tuesday through Sunday, 11:00 am – 4:00 pm Admission: $30 for adults Free for youth ages 17 and under (must be accompanied by an adult) Details: Self-guided tours are available via your mobile device Offer valid during regular operating hours listed above Valid for self-guided tours only No additional discounts apply Tickets may also be purchased at the Welcome Center. Register Here! Outdoors at Bonnet House Museum & Gardens in Fort Lauderdale Beach. Free to attend.
description: Family Summer Special at Bonnet House June 2 – August 30 Bonnet House Museum & Gardens is proud to host our Family Summer Special , presented by Joe DiMaggio Children’s Hospital! Register Here!

title: Orchid Care – Repotting & Mounting plus Combating Pests & Diseases 1pm
address: 900 N Birch Rd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
shortWhy: Culture at Bonnet House Museum & Gardens, Fort Lauderdale Beach.
editorialWhy: Master the Art of Orchid Transplanting This hands-on class will cover every aspect of orchid transplanting, with a focus on proven techniques and the use of diverse materials such as cork, driftwood, plaques, baskets, and even mounting on trees. You’ll also learn the importance of proper tool sterilization to prevent the spread of viruses and keep your collection healthy. Each class concludes with a guided tour of our Orchid Display House and Greenhouses , offering an up-close look at stunning orchid varieties and expert care practices. Meet Your Instructor Join our esteemed orchid curator, Jose Exposito , and his team of orchid care specialists on the historic Bonnet House Estate for these exclusive cultivation classes. Jose is the founder of Soroa Orchids , a senior judge with the American Orchid Society , and a world-renowned speaker featured at World Orchid Conferences in Brazil and Malaysia . His expertise has been highlighted in Orchids Magazine , Vogue , the Martha Stewart Show , and numerous national and international publications. Tuesday, February 23 1:00 – 3:00 pm $30 Member/$35 Non -Member. All class registrations are final and non-refundable. Register Here! Outdoors at Bonnet House Museum & Gardens in Fort Lauderdale Beach. Free to attend.

title: Bonnet House Fine Artists Opening Reception
address: 900 N Birch Rd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
shortWhy: Culture at Bonnet House Museum & Gardens, Fort Lauderdale Beach.
editorialWhy: Step into a vibrant celebration of local creativity in the Gallery’s middle room, where the Bonnet House Fine Artists’ Exhibits showcase a rotating collection of works by talented regional artists. Join us for each exhibit’s opening reception , where you’ll enjoy a sparkling wine welcome, delicious hors d’oeuvres, and a cash bar offering beer, wine, and soda. It’s a relaxed and inviting setting— perfect for connecting with the artists and fellow art enthusiasts. $5 Members, $10 Non-Members (Pre-registration is required) Register Here! Generously sponsored by: Brody & Brody, P.A. & Mary Joe and Richard Brown. At Bonnet House Museum & Gardens in Fort Lauderdale Beach. Free to attend.

title: Orchid Care Basics
address: 900 N Birch Rd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
shortWhy: Art at Bonnet House Museum & Gardens, Fort Lauderdale Beach.
editorialWhy: Discover the Joy of Growing Orchids! New to orchids? This class will teach you how to select the right plants for your growing conditions and provide the essentials—water, light, fertilizer, and temperature—so your orchids thrive and bloom beautifully. Begin your journey into the fascinating world of orchid growing! After each class, enjoy a guided tour of our Orchid Display House and Greenhouses , where you’ll see stunning varieties and learn tips from our experts. Tuesday, September 15 9:30 – 11:30 am $30 members / $35 non-members (all sales are final and non-refundable) Register Here! Outdoors at Bonnet House Museum & Gardens in Fort Lauderdale Beach. Free to attend.
